title: Microsoft agrees to pay $250m to settle lawsuit over Activision Blizzard deal
description: Microsoft will pay $250 million to settle a 2022 class action lawsuit filed by Swedish pension fund Sjunde AP-Fonden AP7, which aimed to block Microsoft's $69 billion acquisition of Activision Blizzard. Read more
